import React from 'react' import ProfilePic from './ProfilePic' import { useDraggable, useDroppable } from '@dnd-kit/react' export default function TicketCard({ title, id, storyPoints, profilePicUrl, type }) { const { ref } = useDraggable({ id: id }) const { ref: dropRef } = useDroppable({ id: id }) return

{title}

{id}

}
